AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PLAY_GOOF_AUDIO.title: Play 'Goof' Audio
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PLAY_GOOF_AUDIO.hover.des:
When 'Goof' reaches 10 or more, it'll pop confetti and play a sound.
[gold]Everyone[/gold]: You'll hear the sound when anyone reaches 10 'Goof'.
[gold]Self[/gold]: You'll hear the sound when you reach 10 'Goof' but not when other players reach 10 'Goof'.
[gold]Never[/gold]: The sound will never play.
